request.description: ## All of the fields are required here.
## Need to submit email and verification_code to verify seller account
## Email field is optional, all the other fields are required
## Need to submit user phone number and verification_code to verify account
## An email will sent to user email address
## To reset password, need to submit query parameter 'token' in the request body. So token should be passed from two places: from query parameter and from request body.
## An OTP will be sent to user phone
## Customer password reset is different. To reset password, need to submit these all: phone, verification_code and new password
## Change password, user just need to submit old password and new password. User should be authenticated before changing password
## This is public endpoint to view a seller profile. No authentication is required here.
## When an authenticated seller want to view his profile, then need to use this endpoint

request.description:
## Seller profile update endpoint
To update working hours, a JSON need to send in this format:
```{"fri": false, "fri_start_hour": "09:00", "fri_end_hour": "10:00", "sat": true, "sat_start_hour": "09:00", "sat_end_hour": "10:00", "sun": true, "sun_start_hour": "09:00", "sun_end_hour": "10:00", "mon": false, "mon_start_hour": "08:00", "mon_end_hour": "10:00", "tue": true, "tue_start_hour": "09:00", "tue_end_hour": "10:00", "wed": true, "wed_start_hour": "09:00", "wed_end_hour": "10:00", "thr": true, "thr_start_hour": "09:00", "thr_end_hour": "10:00"}```
Here ```"fri": false``` or ```"fri": true``` denotes whether Friday is open or not. And start_hour, end_hour is pretty self-descriptive.

To submit image, its necessary to pass image key in this format: ```images[index]image```. Index is incremental index number e.g.: 1, 2, 3 etc.

Please pass the google map location link in `location` field.
## To delete seller profile image, need to pass the image id in the url. Image id can be found in the object of seller profile images array.
## Seller authorized profile view
## Seller update authorized profile

## To create sub services, a JSON need to pass in this format:
```[{"name": "sub service 1", "price": 10}, {"name": "sub service 2", "price": 20}]```. name and price should be define for each sub service.
To add image with sub service, image field should be as: ```images[index]image```, where index is the incremental value like: 1, 2, 3 etc.
## To view the service details, need to pass service id in the endpoint.

formdata.value: new spa treatment is more advanced now

request.description:
## To edit sub_service, need to modify the JSON field. Please be careful, sub_service will be replaced by newly submitted JSON. So if its necessary to add or remove one sub service, previous sub services should also be inside the JSON.

## Submitted images will be added with the service.
## To delete the service, need to pass the service id in the url.
## To delete the service image, need to pass the service image id, which can be found inside the object of service images array.
## It'll show a list of all available services in this platform.

## It'll show a list of all available sub service in this platform.
## Please provide the id of the service to view the list of sub services.
## All the fields are required here
## To view the details of an employee, need to pass the employee id in the URL.
## To update the employee information, employee id is required in URL.
## To delete the employee, employee id should be passed in the URL.
## To view the all employee list of a seller, the seller id should be passed in the URL.
## To filter seller profile, if user choose multiple service, service name should be passed as comma separated values. Also for multiple ratings, ratings should be passed as comma separated values.
## To view all the reviews of a seller, seller id should be passed in the URL.
## To view the seller issue list, ```type=seller``` should be passed in the URL query parameter.
## To create an issue, title should be passed from issue list.

## List of issues created by seller Status value of the issue are as follow:
  • 0 - Pending
  • 1 - Undergoing
  • 2 - Resolved
## Issue list for customer
## To create an issue, title should be passed from issue list.

## List of issues created by seller Status value of the issue are as follow:
  • 0 - Pending
  • 1 - Undergoing
  • 2 - Resolved
## All coupons of the authenticated seller
## All fields are required to create the coupon.
## To view the details of the coupon, need to pass the coupon id in the URL.
## To delete the coupon, need to pass the coupon id in the URL.
## To apply coupon, just need to pass the coupon code in request body. If there's any order in cart, coupon will be applied on that order. Only customer can apply coupon code.
## Customer profile details
## Customer profile update. Only four fields are available for updating.
## To add a service (and its sub services), `service` id, `seller` id, and array of `sub_service` is required. Just need to pass the sub service as array of object in the request body.
## Cart details of the authenticated customer. Which service is added can be found inside the `order_detials` attribute.

## To update the cart, need to pass the `order_id` and `sub_services` array. Please note that `sub_services` field will be overwritten by request body. So if one sub service is removed out of two, the remaining sub service should be passed as JSON object.
## To confirm the order, user need to pass an `order_datetime` and `note` is optional. As per Figma UI, available order date time list will comes from `Customer Get Reservation by Date` API.

## List of customer's all orders The `type` parameter should contain the value as follow:
  • all
  • pending
  • showed up
  • cancelled
The default value for `type` should be `all`.
## The details of an order. Need to pass order id in the URL.
## To edit the date time of an order, need to pass order id in the URL and `order_datetime` in request body.

## List of seller's all order. The `type` parameter should contain the value as follow:
  • all
  • pending
  • showed up
  • cancelled
The default value for `type` should be `all`.
## The details of an order for seller
## To stat an order, need to pass order id in URL and `order_code` to the request body.
## Customer order history. To view the history need to pass `type=history` as URL query parameter.
## To start an order with order code, need to pass `order_code` in the request body.
## To mark an order as complete, need to pass order id in the URL and `order_status=6` is request body. Value 6 denotes a completed order.
## Customer can add review for a completed order. Need to pass order id in URL. `rating` field in request body is mandatory. `review` is optional.
## Customer can view the review he gave for an order. To view that, need to pass order id in the URL.
## To update a review, _order id_ of the corresponding review should be passed in the URL.
## To delete the a review _order id_ of the corresponding review should be passed in the URL.
## To add a seller as favorite, need to pass `seller` id in the request body.
## List of favorite sellers
## To delete a seller from favorite list, need to pass the `seller` id in request body.

## apply_same_config field is optional, it'll receive boolean value.

## To edit the reservation of a particular day, just need to pass the same date and the reservation will be updated.
## For seller, to get the reservation details of a particular day, need to pass reservation_date as query parameter in the URL.
## The reservation available time slot list of a seller. In URL, `seller` id and `reservation_date` should be passed to get the list of time slots.
